# robots.txt — gemoraglobal-tje.caffeine.xyz
# Updated: April 2026

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block internal/utility paths that should not be indexed
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /login/
Disallow: /cart/
Disallow: /checkout/
Disallow: /account/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /*.json$
Disallow: /cdn-cgi/
Disallow: /blog/draft-*

# Allow all major search engine crawlers explicitly
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /

# Sitemap location — always include this
Sitemap: https://gemoraglobal-tje.caffeine.xyz/sitemap.xml
